data.title: HelloNation Breaks Down What First-Time Home Buyers in Hartsville, SC, Should Know Before Purchasing a Home With Real Estate Expert Deborah Gandy
data.description: In Hartsville, South Carolina as of March 25, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discusses important aspects to consider for first-time home buyers in the area. The article delves into financial readiness and various local housing factors that impact the home-buying process. Prospective buyers in Hartsville should familiarize themselves with these key elements before making a purchase.

data.title: Society of Actuaries Announces Clar Rosso as Next CEO
data.description: On March 25, 2026, the Society of Actuaries (SOA), the largest actuarial professional organization globally, revealed Clar Rosso as their newly appointed Chief Executive Officer (CEO). This follows the retirement announcement of former CEO Greg Heidrich, who served in the role until last year.

data.title: DeriW Launches Edge Hour: Time-Limited Trading Challenge with $1M Prize Pool
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Hong Kong, DeriW, a decentralized platform for perpetual derivatives trading backed by CoinW, introduced Edge Hour. This exclusive trading challenge aims to increase engagement by offering a skill-based competition with a minimal entry barrier. Through this initiative, participants will have the opportunity to showcase their trading abilities in a limited time frame.

data.title: Compass Group USA Integrates Climate Intelligence Across Menus and Supply Chain to Accelerate Emissions Reductions
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina, on March 25, 2026 - Compass Group USA has announced their commitment to improving their climate strategy by incorporating carbon intelligence into their digital systems used for menu development, procurement, and supply chain operations. This initiative will provide emissions data directly during these processes, allowing for more informed and sustainable decision-making.

data.title: A notice of the convening of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of LITGRID AB
data.description: The Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders for LITGRID AB, taking place following the Decision of the Board on 25 March 2026, has been arranged at the registered office address Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo st. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius. This meeting is in accordance with the legal entity code 302564383. The Board has endorsed the Meeting's agenda as well as the decision drafts.

data.title: Marshall Islands basic income initiative backed by cryptocurrencies progresses despite IMF caution.
data.description: The Marshall Islands is moving forward with a partnership, despite a caution from the IMF about potential risks. This collaboration aims to broaden the reach of its digital sovereign bond to institutional markets.

data.title: Review led by Philip Rycroft in UK suggests pausing crypto donations due to risks, waiting for better safeguards.
data.description: A review in the UK, headed by Philip Rycroft, has advised implementing a temporary halt on political donations through cryptocurrencies. This recommendation comes until more robust protections and official regulations are established.

data.title: STS Digital debuts structured crypto platform with Kraken as initial partner, providing options-based strategies for institutional clients.
data.description: STS Digital has unveiled a new platform catering to institutional clients, granting them access to options-based strategies via established crypto investment products. This move signals a significant shift within the industry, allowing investors to take advantage of predefined crypto products.

data.title: Dividend payment ex-date of TKM Grupp AS
data.description: TKM Grupp AS, with trading code TKM1T and ISIN code EE0000001105, will end the list of shareholders for dividend payment on March 31, 2026, at the close of the working day of the Nasdaq CSD Estonian Settlement System. Consequently, the ex-date is set for March 30, 2026. Starting from this date, new shareholders will not receive dividends for the year 2025. The company will distribute a dividend of 0.60 euros per share on April 7, 2026.

data.title: DEME celebrates the naming of its next‑generation wind turbine installation vessel, Norse Wind
data.description: Today, DEME reached a significant milestone by unveiling its latest offshore wind turbine installation vessel, Norse Wind. This vessel is a crucial addition to DEME’s offshore fleet and is fitted with a robust 3,200-ton crane. Norse Wind has the capability to transport and install the newest wind turbines and XXL monopiles in depths of up to 70 meters. The official naming ceremony took place at the Port of Oslo and was attended by guests from Belgium and Norway, commemorating the newest addition to DEME’s fleet.

data.title: Atom Computing Announces Strategic Collaboration with Cisco to Advance Scalable, Networked, and Distributed Quantum Computing
data.description: Today in Boulder, Colorado, Atom Computing revealed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with Cisco on March 25, 2026. This partnership aims to investigate the potential of connecting neutral-atom quantum computers via quantum networks. The goal is to establish distributed quantum computing architectures. This collaboration marks a significant step towards advancing quantum computing technology.
